prefabs.name: aerial-combat
prefabs.description: Modern aerial/land/sea combat art and audio pack: side-on cartoon planes, tanks, jeeps, boats and submarines in five team colors, plus VFX, environment props and a full SFX/music set. Shaded, glossy cartoon style, fully animated.

prefabs.name: camera-shake
prefabs.description: Camera-shake library: applies a configurable screen shake effect to the active camera for impacts, explosions, and hits. A single camera_shake(time, mag_r, mag_g, mag_b) call drives an RGB-split displacement that decays over the given duration.

resources.name: obj_camera_shake
resources.description: Persistent controller object that captures the frame to a surface (Pre-Draw), advances the shake timer each step, and re-draws the surface through the shader on Draw-GUI-End before destroying itself when the shake finishes.

resources.name: scr_camera_shake
resources.description: Core script exposing camera_shake(time, mag_r, mag_g, mag_b) to trigger and tune the shake — duration plus per-channel (red/green/blue) magnitude. Auto-creates the controller object on first call.

resources.name: shdr_camera_shake
resources.description: Fragment/vertex shader that performs the block-noise RGB-split screen displacement, with the offset scaled by the per-channel magnitudes and faded out as the shake progresses.

prefabs.name: fantasy-platformer
prefabs.description: A bright, fun cartoon fantasy side-scrolling platformer pack: smoothly animated Knight, Bat, Skeleton and Spider, forest/cave/castle/house environments, tilesets, parallax backdrops, plus a full SFX + music library.

prefabs.name: fantasy-town
prefabs.description: Fantasy Town: a colourful, cartoony pack of 3D-rendered-to-2D medieval town assets — houses, inns, shops, guard towers, market stalls, carts, windmills, trees and farm fields — each provided in front, top-down and isometric projections across four rotation angles.

prefabs.name: maritime-mayhem
prefabs.description: Maritime Mayhem — a bright, detailed cartoon top-down naval action pack: five classes of tall sailing ship plus a rowboat in navy/pirate/plain liveries with damage states, sea-life, coastal terrain and fortifications, plus a full set of nautical SFX, voice and music.

prefabs.name: music-tracks-natural-world
prefabs.description: Natural World ambient audio pack: a dozen-plus long environment soundbeds (arctic, desert, forest, ocean, volcano and more) plus looping weather, water, fire and animal ambiences and a few short geological one-shots, all in .mp3 — for layering immersive outdoor atmosphere under a game scene.

resources.name: MP3_SFX_Birdsong
resources.description: Bright, cheerful chorus of songbirds chirping and trilling, ~30s loop — sunny daytime woodland ambience.

resources.name: MP3_SFX_Campfire
resources.description: Crackling, popping campfire with snapping embers, ~21s loop — cozy warm fireside vibe.

resources.name: MP3_SFX_Crickets
resources.description: Steady rhythmic cricket chirping, ~30s loop — calm nighttime field or summer-evening ambience.

resources.name: MP3_SFX_Crows
resources.description: Harsh cawing of crows over open air, ~30s loop — bleak, ominous rural atmosphere.

resources.name: MP3_SFX_Inferno
resources.description: Roaring, hungry blaze with deep crackle and rushing flame, ~26s loop — intense raging-fire ambience.

resources.name: MP3_SFX_Owls
resources.description: Low hooting owls in still air, ~30s loop — eerie, tranquil nighttime forest mood.

resources.name: MP3_SFX_Rain_Heavy
resources.description: Dense, drumming downpour of heavy rainfall, ~30s loop — stormy, soaking-wet atmosphere.

resources.name: MP3_SFX_Rain_Light
resources.description: Soft, gentle patter of light rain, ~30s loop — calm, drizzly overcast mood.

resources.name: MP3_SFX_Rain_On_Roof
resources.description: Rain pattering and tapping on a rooftop, ~26s loop — snug indoor-during-a-storm feel.

resources.name: MP3_SFX_Rockslide_Big
resources.description: Heavy tumbling crash of a large rockslide, ~7s one-shot — big crumbling-cliff impact.

resources.name: MP3_SFX_Rockslide_Small
resources.description: Short clatter of smaller falling rocks and scree, ~6.5s one-shot — minor rockfall.

resources.name: MP3_SFX_Seagulls
resources.description: Crying seagulls wheeling overhead, ~29s loop — breezy coastal seaside ambience.

resources.name: MP3_SFX_Thunder_01
resources.description: Single rolling thunderclap with a long rumble, ~14.5s one-shot — storm thunder hit.

resources.name: MP3_SFX_Thunder_02
resources.description: Sharp cracking thunderclap fading to a rumble, ~14s one-shot — storm thunder variant.

resources.name: MP3_SFX_Thunder_03
resources.description: Deep booming thunderclap, ~13s one-shot — heavy storm thunder variant.

resources.name: MP3_SFX_Waterfalls
resources.description: Steady roaring cascade of falling water, ~30s loop — powerful waterfall ambience.

resources.name: MP3_SFX_Waves_Heavy
resources.description: Big crashing ocean breakers pounding the shore, ~30s loop — rough, powerful surf.

resources.name: MP3_SFX_Waves_Light
resources.description: Gentle lapping of small waves, ~30s loop — calm, lazy shoreline ambience.

resources.name: MP3_SFX_Waves_Medium
resources.description: Moderate rolling waves washing in and out, ~30s loop — relaxed seaside surf.

resources.name: MP3_SFX_Whalesong
resources.description: Haunting, melodic moans and calls of whales, ~25s loop — deep, otherworldly oceanic mood.

resources.name: MP3_SFX_Wind
resources.description: Sustained gusting wind sweeping past, ~30s loop — exposed, blustery open-air ambience.

resources.name: MP3_SND_Arctic
resources.description: Long frozen-tundra soundbed of cold whistling wind over icy emptiness, ~80s — bleak arctic atmosphere.

resources.name: MP3_SND_Badlands
resources.description: Long arid soundbed of dry desolate wind over barren terrain, ~75s — harsh badlands atmosphere.

resources.name: MP3_SND_Desert
resources.description: Long hot-desert soundbed of shifting sand and dry wind, ~75s — vast, parched dune atmosphere.

resources.name: MP3_SND_Forest_At_Night
resources.description: Long nocturnal woodland soundbed of crickets, owls and rustling leaves, ~89s — dark, alive forest-at-night atmosphere.

resources.name: MP3_SND_Grasslands
resources.description: Long open-prairie soundbed of wind through grass with distant birds, ~78s — wide, rolling grassland atmosphere.

resources.name: MP3_SND_Oceans
resources.description: Long open-ocean soundbed of rolling waves and sea air, ~72s — expansive coastal atmosphere.

resources.name: MP3_SND_Rainforest
resources.description: Long jungle soundbed of dripping rain, exotic birds and dense foliage, ~65s — lush, humid rainforest atmosphere.

resources.name: MP3_SND_Riverlands
resources.description: Long riverside soundbed of flowing water and gentle current, ~78s — fresh, watery riverlands atmosphere.

resources.name: MP3_SND_Underwater
resources.description: Long submerged soundbed of muffled gurgles and drifting currents, ~82s — deep, weightless underwater atmosphere.

resources.name: MP3_SND_Volcano
resources.description: Long volcanic soundbed of bubbling lava, low rumbles and fire, ~63s — ominous, molten geothermal atmosphere.

resources.name: MP3_SND_Woodlands
resources.description: Long temperate-forest soundbed of rustling leaves and scattered birdsong, ~80s — calm, leafy woodland atmosphere.

prefabs.name: ninja-woods
prefabs.description: Ninja Woods — a pixel-art side-scrolling platformer pack (Windy Woods remaster) with a blue ninja hero, pink yokai monsters, lush forest and cave environments, Japanese torii end-gate, full HUD/touch UI, and four .mp3 music tracks. Retro, simple, charming.

resources.name: MP3_Ninja_Woods_Win_Sting

prefabs.name: scifi-space-shooter
prefabs.description: Bright, detailed cartoon sci-fi space-shooter art and audio pack: 3 player ships, 6 enemy ships, 6 turrets, animated weapons and VFX, a modular space station, and full SFX plus music tracks for a vertical scrolling shmup.

prefabs.name: sfx-fantasy
prefabs.description: HD realistic medieval-fantasy sound pack: long location ambiences (cave, church, farm, tavern, blacksmith, battle, town) plus short feature one-shots for trade, warfare and village life — gates, carts, forge work, weapons and footsteps.

resources.name: MP3_Arrow_Hit_1
resources.description: Sharp arrow strike, ~1s — fletched shaft thudding into its target with a solid impact. Crisp combat one-shot.

resources.name: MP3_Arrow_Hit_2
resources.description: Arrow impact variant, ~1.25s — slightly heavier thud as the shaft lands and quivers. Crisp combat one-shot.

resources.name: MP3_Battle_Background__Close_Large_
resources.description: 60s battle ambience bed — a large army at close range: clashing steel, shouting, and the roar of melee swirling around the listener. Intense, chaotic war soundscape.

resources.name: MP3_Battle_Background__Close_Medium_
resources.description: 60s battle ambience bed — a medium force fighting nearby: ringing weapons and battle cries with a tighter, less overwhelming density.

resources.name: MP3_Battle_Background__Far_Large_
resources.description: 60s battle ambience bed — a large army heard from a distance: a low rumble of massed combat, muffled clashes and a wash of distant shouting.

resources.name: MP3_Battle_Background__Far_Medium_
resources.description: 60s battle ambience bed — a medium force in the distance: faint clamor of fighting drifting on the air. Tense, atmospheric backdrop.

resources.name: MP3_Blacksmith_1
resources.description: 30s blacksmith ambience — rhythmic hammer strikes, crackling forge fire and clinking tools fill a busy smithy. Warm, industrious workshop bed.

resources.name: MP3_Blacksmith_2
resources.description: 30s blacksmith ambience variant — steady hammering and forge-fire crackle with a different pacing of the smithy's work.

resources.name: MP3_Bow_Load_1
resources.description: ~1.2s bow draw — creak of wood and tightening string as an arrow is nocked and pulled back. Taut, anticipatory one-shot.

resources.name: MP3_Bow_Load_2
resources.description: ~1.25s bow draw variant — wooden creak and stretching string as the bow is readied to fire.

resources.name: MP3_Bow_Release_1
resources.description: ~1.5s bow release — the snap of the string and whoosh of the arrow loosing. Quick, satisfying shot.

resources.name: MP3_Bow_Release_2
resources.description: ~1.75s bow release variant — string twang and arrow whoosh with a slightly longer tail.

resources.name: MP3_Cart_1
resources.description: 10s wooden cart roll — creaking timbers and rumbling wheels trundling over rough ground. Loopable trade-and-travel one-shot.

resources.name: MP3_Cart_2
resources.description: 10s wooden cart roll variant — creaking axles and clattering wheels at a slightly different gait.

resources.name: MP3_Catapult_Firing_1
resources.description: ~3.25s catapult firing — the heavy thunk and creaking release of the arm as it hurls its payload. Weighty siege one-shot.

resources.name: MP3_Catapult_Firing_2
resources.description: ~3.25s catapult firing variant — groan of timber and the launching snap of the throwing arm.

resources.name: MP3_Catapult_Winding_1
resources.description: ~2.5s catapult winding — ratcheting clicks and straining rope as the arm is cranked back under tension.

resources.name: MP3_Catapult_Winding_2
resources.description: ~2.8s catapult winding variant — clacking ratchet and creaking tension as the siege engine is primed.

resources.name: MP3_Cave_1
resources.description: 30s cave ambience — dripping water, hollow echoes and a deep underground hush. Damp, eerie subterranean bed.

resources.name: MP3_Cave_2
resources.description: 30s cave ambience variant — sparse drips and resonant cavern reverb, slightly different drip pattern. Cold, atmospheric.

resources.name: MP3_Church_Exterior_1
resources.description: 30s church exterior ambience — distant bells, gentle wind and faint outdoor activity around the building. Solemn, open-air bed.

resources.name: MP3_Church_Exterior_2
resources.description: 30s church exterior ambience variant — tolling bells and ambient breeze outside the church walls.

resources.name: MP3_Church_Interior_1
resources.description: 30s church interior ambience — echoing stone hall, hushed footsteps and a reverent stillness. Sacred, cavernous indoor bed.

resources.name: MP3_Church_Interior_2
resources.description: 30s church interior ambience variant — soft reverberant hush of the nave with subtle movement. Reverent and still.

resources.name: MP3_Coin_Stack_Clink_1
resources.description: ~1s coin clink — a stack of metal coins jingling and settling. Bright, satisfying treasure-and-trade one-shot.

resources.name: MP3_Coin_Stack_Clink_2
resources.description: ~0.75s coin clink variant — a quick, lighter shimmer of coins tumbling together.

resources.name: MP3_Farm_Background__Close_Active_
resources.description: 60s farm ambience — a lively close-up farmyard: clucking, animal calls and bustling rural chores. Warm, busy countryside bed.

resources.name: MP3_Farm_Background__Close_Inactive_
resources.description: 60s farm ambience variant — a quiet, idle farmyard up close: gentle animal stirrings and a calm rural hush.

resources.name: MP3_Flag_Flapping_In_Breeze_1
resources.description: 10s flag in a light breeze — soft fabric ripples fluttering gently. Subtle outdoor banner texture.

resources.name: MP3_Flag_Flapping_In_Breeze_2
resources.description: ~9.5s flag in a light breeze variant — gentle cloth flutter with a slightly different rhythm.

resources.name: MP3_Flag_Flapping_In_Wind_1
resources.description: ~10.75s flag in strong wind — sharp, snapping cloth cracking and billowing. Energetic banner texture.

resources.name: MP3_Flag_Flapping_In_Wind_2
resources.description: ~9.75s flag in strong wind variant — vigorous flapping and snaps of taut fabric.

resources.name: MP3_Footsteps_Grass
resources.description: 10s of footsteps on grass — soft, swishing strides over turf. Loopable movement bed for outdoor travel.

resources.name: MP3_Footsteps_Mud
resources.description: 10s of footsteps in mud — wet, squelching steps with a heavy suck. Loopable movement bed for marshy ground.

resources.name: MP3_Footsteps_Stone
resources.description: 10s of footsteps on stone — firm, clicking strides echoing off hard paving. Loopable movement bed for cobbles or castle floors.

resources.name: MP3_Forge_Hammering_Sound_1
resources.description: ~10s of forge hammering — sustained rhythmic clangs of hammer on hot metal at the anvil. Steady smithing loop.

resources.name: MP3_Forge_Hammering_Sound_2
resources.description: ~0.4s single forge hammer strike — one sharp ring of metal on anvil. Tight one-shot impact.

resources.name: MP3_Forge_Heating_Sound_1
resources.description: 10s forge heating — the roar and crackle of bellows-fed flames heating metal in the fire. Warm, fiery loop.

resources.name: MP3_Forge_Heating_Sound_2
resources.description: 10s forge heating variant — steady whoosh and crackle of the forge fire at a different intensity.

resources.name: MP3_Grindstone_1
resources.description: 20s grindstone — the gritty, grinding whir of a blade being sharpened against a spinning whetstone, with occasional sparks. Abrasive workshop one-shot.

resources.name: MP3_Grindstone_2
resources.description: 20s grindstone variant — rasping, scraping spin of the sharpening wheel at a different cadence.

resources.name: MP3_Metal_Quenching_Sizzle_1
resources.description: ~4.5s quenching sizzle — red-hot metal plunged into water with a violent hiss and bubbling steam. Sharp blacksmithing one-shot.

resources.name: MP3_Metal_Quenching_Sizzle_2
resources.description: ~4.25s quenching sizzle variant — searing hiss and crackle as hot steel is cooled in water.

resources.name: MP3_Portcullis_Close_1
resources.description: ~4.75s portcullis dropping — rattling chains and the heavy crash of an iron gate slamming down. Weighty castle gate one-shot.

resources.name: MP3_Portcullis_Close_2
resources.description: ~5s portcullis dropping variant — clanking chains and the grinding thud of the grille hitting the ground.

resources.name: MP3_Portcullis_Raise_1
resources.description: ~6.25s portcullis raising — straining chains and grinding metal as the iron gate is winched upward. Effortful castle gate one-shot.

resources.name: MP3_Portcullis_Raise_2
resources.description: ~4.75s portcullis raising variant — ratcheting chain and scraping iron as the grille lifts.

resources.name: MP3_Sword_Draw_1
resources.description: ~2.5s sword draw — the long metallic scrape of a blade sliding from its scabbard with a bright ring. Classic weapon one-shot.

resources.name: MP3_Sword_Draw_2
resources.description: ~1.5s sword draw variant — a quicker steely shing as the blade clears the sheath.

resources.name: MP3_Tavern_External_1
resources.description: 60s tavern exterior ambience — muffled merriment, chatter and clinking heard from outside the inn, with street air around it. Inviting village bed.

resources.name: MP3_Tavern_External_2
resources.description: 60s tavern exterior ambience variant — dampened revelry and crowd murmur drifting out of the alehouse.

resources.name: MP3_Tavern_Internal_1
resources.description: 60s tavern interior ambience — boisterous crowd chatter, laughter, clinking mugs and a warm, crowded room tone. Lively inn bed.

resources.name: MP3_Tavern_Internal_2
resources.description: 60s tavern interior ambience variant — bustling drinkers, conversation and tankard clinks filling the alehouse.

resources.name: MP3_Town_Market_1
resources.description: ~56s town market ambience — bustling crowd, haggling voices and the clatter of trade in a busy medieval marketplace. Vibrant village bed.

resources.name: MP3_Town_Market_2
resources.description: 60s town market ambience variant — dense crowd chatter and stall activity of a thriving market.

resources.name: MP3_Town_Square_1
resources.description: ~51s town square ambience — open-air crowd murmur, passing footsteps and general village activity around a public square. Spacious settlement bed.

resources.name: MP3_Town_Square_2
resources.description: 60s town square ambience variant — ambient townsfolk chatter and movement across the square.

resources.name: MP3_Weapon_Hit_On_Armor_1

prefabs.name: transition-angular
prefabs.description: An angular room transition — a radial wipe sweeping around the center by angle.

prefabs.name: transition-base
prefabs.description: Room transitions via a full-screen blend shader. Derive a new effect by overriding just the fragment shader — the goto() API and machinery come for free.

prefabs.name: transition-bounce
prefabs.description: A bounce room transition — the outgoing room drops and bounces away with a soft shadow.

prefabs.name: transition-bowtie
prefabs.description: A bowtie room transition — twin triangular wedges open from the edges to reveal the next room.

prefabs.name: transition-burn
prefabs.description: A film-burn room transition — a warm color flare washes across as one room burns into the next.

prefabs.name: transition-butterfly-wave
prefabs.description: A butterfly-wave room transition — a rippling butterfly-curve warp with chromatic separation.

prefabs.name: transition-caleidoscope
prefabs.description: A kaleidoscope room transition — a mirrored, rotating fractal fold between rooms.

prefabs.name: transition-circle-crop
prefabs.description: A circle-crop room transition — the outgoing room collapses into a shrinking circle over a background colour before the incoming room fills back in.

prefabs.name: transition-circle-open
prefabs.description: A circle-open room transition — a soft-edged circular wipe expands from the centre to reveal the incoming room.

prefabs.name: transition-color-distance
prefabs.description: A colour-distance room transition — pixels switch based on the colour difference between the two rooms, then fade to the incoming room.

prefabs.name: transition-color-phase
prefabs.description: A colour-phase room transition — the rooms blend per-channel across staggered phase thresholds.

prefabs.name: transition-crazy-parametric
prefabs.description: A crazy-parametric room transition — a parametric wobble warps the outgoing room as the incoming room settles in.

prefabs.name: transition-cross-hatch
prefabs.description: A cross-hatch room transition — a randomised hatch dissolve reveals the incoming room from a centre point.

prefabs.name: transition-cross-warp
prefabs.description: A cross-warp room transition — both rooms warp and dissolve into each other.

prefabs.name: transition-cross-zoom
prefabs.description: A cross-zoom room transition — a blurred zoom-and-dissolve between rooms.

prefabs.name: transition-cube
prefabs.description: A rotating-cube room transition — the rooms map onto two faces of a spinning 3D cube.

prefabs.name: transition-directional
prefabs.description: A directional slide room transition — the outgoing room slides away revealing the incoming room.

prefabs.name: transition-directional-warp
prefabs.description: A directional-warp room transition — a smooth diagonal warp wipe between rooms.

prefabs.name: transition-doom
prefabs.description: A Doom-style room transition — vertical bars slide down like the classic DOOM screen melt.

prefabs.name: transition-doorway
prefabs.description: A doorway room transition — the outgoing room splits open down the middle while the incoming room zooms in behind it, over a floor reflection.

prefabs.name: transition-dreamy
prefabs.description: A dreamy room transition — a gentle wavy displacement crossfade between the outgoing and incoming rooms.

prefabs.name: transition-dreamy-zoom
prefabs.description: A dreamy-zoom room transition — a rotate-and-zoom crossfade that blooms to white at the midpoint.

prefabs.name: transition-fade-color
prefabs.description: A fade-through-color room transition — fades the outgoing room to a solid colour, then up into the incoming room.

prefabs.name: transition-fade-grayscale
prefabs.description: A fade-through-grayscale room transition — desaturates to grayscale mid-way, then back to full colour.

prefabs.name: transition-flye-eye
prefabs.description: A fly-eye room transition — a rippling lens displacement with chromatic separation between rooms.

prefabs.name: transition-glitch-displace
prefabs.description: A glitchy room transition — voronoi-driven displacement with a desaturated flash between rooms.

prefabs.name: transition-glitch-memories
prefabs.description: A glitchy room transition — blocky RGB channel-split jitter that settles onto the incoming room.

prefabs.name: transition-grid-flip
prefabs.description: A grid room transition — the screen splits into tiles that flip to reveal the incoming room.

prefabs.name: transition-heart
prefabs.description: A heart-shaped room transition — a heart wipe grows from the centre to reveal the incoming room.

prefabs.name: transition-hexagonalize
prefabs.description: A hexagon room transition — the image dissolves into growing hexagonal cells and back into the incoming room.

prefabs.name: transition-leaf
prefabs.description: A leaf-shaped room transition — a serrated leaf silhouette grows from the centre to reveal the incoming room.

prefabs.name: transition-linear-blur
prefabs.description: A directional motion-blur room transition — both rooms smear outward as they cross-fade.

prefabs.name: transition-luminance-melt
prefabs.description: A luminance-driven melt room transition — pixels dissolve by brightness with a noisy advancing front.

prefabs.name: transition-morph
prefabs.description: A morph room transition — the two rooms warp into one another along their colour gradients while cross-fading.

prefabs.name: transition-mosaic
prefabs.description: A mosaic room transition — the frame breaks into rotating tiles that travel across a grid to reveal the next room.

prefabs.name: transition-multiply-blend
prefabs.description: A multiply-blend room transition — the two rooms darken through each other before resolving to the next.

prefabs.name: transition-perlin
prefabs.description: A perlin-noise dissolve room transition — the outgoing room breaks up along a noise field to reveal the next.

prefabs.name: transition-pinwheel
prefabs.description: A pinwheel / clock-wipe room transition — a rotating wedge sweep between rooms.

prefabs.name: transition-pixelize
prefabs.description: A pixelize room transition — the rooms dissolve through a growing/shrinking mosaic of squares.

prefabs.name: transition-polar-function
prefabs.description: A polar-function room transition — a scalloped, petal-shaped radial wipe reveals the next room.

prefabs.name: transition-polka-dots-curtain
prefabs.description: A polka-dots-curtain room transition — a grid of dots expands from a corner to reveal the next room.

prefabs.name: transition-radial
prefabs.description: A radial room transition — a clock-hand sweep rotates around the centre to reveal the next room.

prefabs.name: transition-random-squares
prefabs.description: A random-squares room transition — square tiles flip to the next room in a random, spreading order.

prefabs.name: transition-ripple
prefabs.description: A ripple room transition — a water-like wave distorts the outgoing room as it fades to the next.

prefabs.name: transition-rotate-scale-face
prefabs.description: A rotate-scale-fade room transition — spins and zooms the frame while cross-fading between the outgoing and incoming rooms.

prefabs.name: transition-simple-zoom
prefabs.description: A simple-zoom room transition — the outgoing room zooms into itself as the incoming room fades in.

prefabs.name: transition-squares-wire
prefabs.description: A squares-wire room transition — a diagonal sweep that dissolves the frame through a grid of growing squares.

prefabs.name: transition-squeeze
prefabs.description: A squeeze room transition — the outgoing room squeezes vertically to a line with a chromatic-aberration smear as the incoming room appears.

prefabs.name: transition-swap
prefabs.description: A swap room transition — the outgoing room slides back into depth while the incoming room slides forward, with a floor reflection.

prefabs.name: transition-swirl
prefabs.description: A swirl room transition — the frame twists into a spiral and unwinds to reveal the incoming room.

prefabs.name: transition-undulating-burnout
prefabs.description: An undulating burn-out room transition — a wavy radial burn sweeps out from the centre to reveal the next room.

prefabs.name: transition-water-drop
prefabs.description: A water-drop room transition — concentric ripples distort the outgoing room as the next one fades in.

prefabs.name: transition-wind
prefabs.description: A wind room transition — the outgoing room is blown away in horizontal streaks to reveal the next.

prefabs.name: transition-window-blinds
prefabs.description: A window-blinds room transition — horizontal blinds sweep across to reveal the next room.

prefabs.name: transition-window-slice
prefabs.description: A window-slice room transition — vertical slices wipe across to reveal the next room.

prefabs.name: transition-zoom-in-circles
prefabs.description: A zoom-in-circles room transition — concentric rings zoom inward to reveal the next room.

prefabs.name: ui-panels-flat
prefabs.description: Flat-style UI pack of ~135 user-interface elements - bordered panels, ribbon banners, solid button shapes (circle, square, diamond, triangle), pill and rectangle bars, dot toggles and vertical scrollbars - in nine color variants (blue, cyan, green, grey, orange, pink, purple, red, yellow), each with a soft two-tone gradient and clean flat edges.

prefabs.name: ui-sfx-horror
prefabs.description: A horror-flavored UI sound pack: ~39 dark synth interface blips and stings — clicks, hovers, confirms, errors, sliders, swipes and window transitions — all rendered with an eerie, dread-laced synth character for menus and HUDs.

resources.name: Keyboard_Click_1
resources.description: Dark horror-synth keyboard keystroke, ~1.5s — dull dread-tinged typing blip for text entry.

resources.name: Keyboard_Click_2
resources.description: Short eerie keyboard tap, ~0.5s — clipped horror-synth keystroke for fast typing feedback.

resources.name: Keyboard_Click_3
resources.description: Lower, drawn-out horror-synth keyboard press, ~1.75s — moody key thud variant.

resources.name: Mouse_Click_1
resources.description: Ominous horror-synth mouse click, ~1.25s — UI select/confirm blip with a cold, hollow tone.

resources.name: Mouse_Click_2
resources.description: Tighter eerie mouse click, ~1s — dark synth press for button activation.

resources.name: Mouse_Hover_1
resources.description: Soft uneasy hover tone, ~0.5s — subtle horror-synth shimmer as the cursor passes a UI element.

resources.name: Mouse_Hover_2
resources.description: Very short whispery hover tick, ~0.17s — faint dread-laced cursor focus blip.

resources.name: No_Button_1
resources.description: Foreboding 'No'/cancel sting, ~3s — descending horror-synth tone signaling rejection or decline.

resources.name: No_Button_2
resources.description: Shorter ominous cancel blip, ~1.25s — clipped dark synth 'No' confirmation.

resources.name: Pop_1
resources.description: Warped horror-synth pop, ~4.25s — eerie bubbling element-appear sound with a sinister resonance.

resources.name: Pop_2
resources.description: Shorter dark pop, ~3s — uneasy synth burst for popping a UI element into view.

resources.name: Popdown_1
resources.description: Falling horror-synth pop-down, ~1.25s — element retracting with a downward dread-tinged sweep.

resources.name: Popdown_2
resources.description: Longer brooding pop-down, ~2.75s — drawn-out dark synth collapse of a UI element.

resources.name: Popup_1
resources.description: Rising horror-synth pop-up, ~1.25s — element emerging with an uneasy upward swell.

resources.name: Popup_2
resources.description: Extended ominous pop-up, ~5s — slow, dread-building synth rise as a panel appears.

resources.name: Power_Off_1

prefabs.name: world-backgrounds
prefabs.description: Parallax background packs for five themed game worlds — volcanic Flameville, a haunted graveyard, a snowy Ice Land, a glowing Neon City, and a sunken Underwater ruin — each delivered as a full composite plus 5+ separable parallax layers, in two visual styles: chunky retro pixel art and smooth illustrated/painted art. Colorful, atmospheric, 1920x1080.

resources.name: spr_flameville
resources.description: Pixel-art volcanic landscape: an erupting volcano spewing lava down its slopes, glowing molten rivers in the foreground and a fiery orange-and-purple sky.

resources.name: spr_flameville_layer00
resources.description: Pixel-art back sky band for the volcanic scene — dark indigo fading to fiery orange and yellow at the horizon.

resources.name: spr_flameville_layer00_vec
resources.description: Painted sky gradient for the volcanic world, warm peach to dusky rose.

resources.description: Pixel-art streaky ember clouds in red and orange for the volcanic sky.

resources.name: spr_flameville_layer01_vec
resources.description: Painted wispy clouds and rising smoke over the volcanic horizon.

prefabs.name: world-tilesets
prefabs.description: Twenty auto-tile-ready 47-tile platformer terrain tilesets across five biomes (ice, lava, haunted, neon city, underwater), each in pixel-art and illustrated styles and in side-on and top-down variants, with matching preview sprite copies.
